name: 16p11_2_BP2_BP3_SD
description: BP2 and BP3 segmental duplication blocks of the 16p11.2-p12.1 region — bound the rare ~9 Mb 16p11.2-p12.1 deletion that includes both the proximal 16p11.2 and 16p12.1 recurrent intervals. Direct-orientation duplicons at >98% identity.

architecture.internal_structure: BP2 (~150 kb at 16p12.1) and BP3 (~150 kb between 16p12.1 and 16p11.2) at >98% identity; LCR16a-derived core; share content with BP4-BP5 NPIPB duplicons.
